name: OCU P4 Observe
description: Validates the observation engine: factory, ring buffer, 5 observer backends (ld_preload/plthook/dbus/cdp/ax_tree), stress behaviour.

metadata._llm_driven_reason: Vision-driven test suite per HelixQA Constitution §1 (Fully Autonomous LLM-Driven QA): prose actions are interpreted by the vision model. Article XI §11.5 exemption.
metadata.author: vasic-digital

test_cases.name: factory-register-and-open

steps.name: Run factory register and open

test_cases.expected_result: Custom factory registered under a test kind is discoverable via Kinds() and Open() returns a non-nil Observer

test_cases.name: factory-unknown-kind-errors

steps.name: Run factory unknown kind error case

test_cases.expected_result: Open() returns a non-nil error containing the unregistered kind name

test_cases.name: factory-kinds-listing

steps.name: Run factory Kinds listing test

test_cases.expected_result: Kinds() returns a sorted list that includes all registered kinds

test_cases.name: factory-default-buffer-size

steps.name: Run factory default buffer size test

test_cases.expected_result: Config.BufferSize=0 is normalised to 1024 before the Factory is called

test_cases.name: factory-concurrent-register-race

steps.name: Run factory concurrent register race check

test_cases.expected_result: Concurrent Register() and Open() calls produce no data races under -race

test_cases.name: ring-push-and-snapshot-happy

steps.name: Run ring push and snapshot happy path

test_cases.expected_result: Events pushed to the ring are returned by Snapshot with zero window in insertion order

test_cases.name: ring-window-filtering

steps.name: Run ring window filtering test

test_cases.expected_result: Snapshot(at, window) returns only events whose timestamps fall in (at-window, at]

test_cases.name: ring-eviction-when-full

steps.name: Run ring eviction test

test_cases.expected_result: Pushing beyond capacity evicts the oldest events; Len() never exceeds capacity

test_cases.name: ring-snapshot-empty

steps.name: Run ring empty snapshot test

test_cases.expected_result: Snapshot on an empty ring returns nil without panicking

test_cases.name: ring-concurrent-push

steps.name: Run ring concurrent push race test

test_cases.expected_result: 64 goroutines pushing concurrently produce no data races under -race

test_cases.name: ld-preload-production-returns-err-not-wired

steps.name: Run ld_preload production sentinel test

test_cases.expected_result: ld_preload Observer.Start() returns ErrNotWired when no producer is wired (P4.5 deferred)

test_cases.name: ld-preload-mock-produces-events

steps.name: Run ld_preload mock event production test

test_cases.expected_result: Mock producer emits events that flow through the ring buffer and Events() channel

test_cases.name: ld-preload-registered-in-init

steps.name: Run ld_preload factory registration test

test_cases.expected_result: ld_preload package init() registers 'ld_preload' kind in the factory

test_cases.name: plthook-production-returns-err-not-wired

steps.name: Run plthook production sentinel test

test_cases.expected_result: plthook Observer.Start() returns ErrNotWired when no producer is wired (P4.5 deferred)

test_cases.name: plthook-mock-produces-events

steps.name: Run plthook mock event production test

test_cases.expected_result: Mock producer emits events through the ring buffer and Events() channel

test_cases.name: dbus-mock-produces-events

steps.name: Run dbus mock event production test

test_cases.expected_result: Mock D-Bus producer emits EventKindDBus events through ring and channel

test_cases.name: cdp-mock-produces-events

steps.name: Run cdp mock event production test

test_cases.expected_result: Mock CDP producer emits EventKindCDP events through ring and channel

test_cases.name: ax-tree-mock-produces-events

steps.name: Run ax_tree mock event production test

test_cases.expected_result: Mock AT-SPI2 producer emits EventKindAXTree events through ring and channel

test_cases.name: stress-100-concurrent-all-backends

steps.name: Run 100-goroutine stress test across all 5 backends

test_cases.expected_result: 100 concurrent Start→drain→Snapshot→Stop cycles across all 5 backends complete with no data races under -race

test_cases.name: integration-all-five-kinds-registered

steps.name: Run integration smoke — all five kinds registered

test_cases.expected_result: After blank-importing all 5 sub-packages, Kinds() contains ld_preload, plthook, dbus, cdp, ax_tree

test_cases.name: integration-open-each-kind

steps.name: Run integration smoke — Open each kind

test_cases.expected_result: Open() succeeds for all 5 kinds, returning a non-nil Observer (ErrNotWired at Start time, not Open time)
